ācarita p. p.
1 Done, observed, practised, as a rite or usage &c.
2 Usual, customary.
3 Enjoined, fixed by rule.
— taṃ
1 Conduct, behaviour.
2 One of the five means of recovering or paying back debt;
(pb)  Ms. 8. 49 ; see also Bṛhaspati quoted by  Kull.
